original: Your egg has grown truly, unnaturally, enormously massive inside you. Your belly is swollen beyond anything you’d have thought possible, stretching out ahead of you in swollen majesty. Every step, every slight motion you make, is nearly orgasmic now. You can’t help but play with yourself constantly: not sexually, but simply rubbing your hands on your [pc.belly]. Sometimes, you find yourself spending minutes just enjoying the feeling of fullness, of your fingers brushing across your taut flesh.
Your egg has grown bigger and bigger, now stretching your

so thoroughly that you look positively gravid. It feels wonderful, when you’re not complaining about your back or struggling through doors - the feeling of your belly stretched out around the sheer size of the egg, the way it moves around inside you - it’s constantly bathing you in pleasurable sensations.

Your movements have slowly begun to feel... sluggish. Like your body weighs a little more than it should. You’ve also been craving foods that are high in protein lately, and you’ve been drinking a lot more water than usual recently. \n\nYou consider the possibility that maybe you’re just craving foods and you’re more dehydrated than you realize, but you know that, so soon from your coupling with [frostwyrm.name], it’s better to assume that you’re good and pregnant. Still, no need to panic yet; just keep doing what you’re doing. You’ll know for sure in a couple days.

Your stomach’s a little more bloated than usual these past few days, and your cravings for certain foods and tons of water haven’t stopped. When you press into your belly, the [pc.skinFurScales] feel a lot tougher and firmer than you believe should be right.\n\nNo point in beating around the bush: you’re probably pregnant with the Frostwyrm’s kip. You have no idea what to expect going forward; maybe you should take it a little more cautiously. No doubt a Frostwyrm child is hardier than "+{var1}.indefiniteArticle("frostwyrm"===pc.raceShort()?"human":{var0}.race())+" baby, but that doesn’t give you an excuse to go wild. You’re eating for two, now.

When you press into your belly, the [pc.skinFurScales] feel a lot tougher and firmer than you believe should be right.\n\nNo point in beating around the bush: you’re probably pregnant with the Frostwyrm’s kip. You have no idea what to expect going forward; maybe you should take it a little more cautiously. No doubt a Frostwyrm child is hardier than "+Ot.m.indefiniteArticle("frostwyrm"===pc.raceShort()?"human":pc.race())+" baby, but that doesn’t give you an excuse to go wild. You’re eating for two, now.")

original: Lately you’ve been feeling a little... different. Not in a bad way, exactly, but not always in a good way either. Your mood sometimes swings pretty wildly, from joyful and expressive, to angry and borderline destructive, to horny and lustful, to everything in between. But the words for those emotions don’t really do them justice; what you truly feel is much more... primeval. Raw. Unfocused. You knew to expect mood swings with pregnancies, but this is still different. Sometimes, you don’t feel like you’re completely in control of yourself or your feelings. You suppose it must be because of your little passenger; [frostwyrm.name] told you that it already had psionic powers, and that they were growing exponentially every day. As if your growing paunch wasn’t bad enough, your kip is commandeering your own emotions, too."+({var0}.isLactating()?"":" Your boobs also aren’t getting any larger, and you don’t feel like you’re about to start lactating, so you don’t even get the fun stuff out of this pregnancy.")+" It’s only been fifty days; you still have seventy more, thereabouts, until this thing is out of you.

You knew to expect mood swings with pregnancies, but this is still different. Sometimes, you don’t feel like you’re completely in control of yourself or your feelings. You suppose it must be because of your little passenger; [frostwyrm.name] told you that it already had psionic powers, and that they were growing exponentially every day. As if your growing paunch wasn’t bad enough, your kip is commandeering your own emotions, too."+(pc.isLactating()?"":" Your boobs also aren’t getting any larger, and you don’t feel like you’re about to start lactating, so you don’t even get the fun stuff out of this pregnancy.")+" It’s only been fifty days; you still have seventy more, thereabouts, until this thing is out of you.")

original: With a groan, you stop and play your hand over your quite gravid middle. You’re barely a third of the way through your projected pregnancy duration and sure enough, just as you’d feared, you look ready to pop. Indeed, you’re growing increasingly paranoid about bumping into things or pitching over outright -- this egg hasn’t exactly given you a lot of time to adapt! Due to your gravid size, getting around is going to be more difficult -- and probably for quite a while yet. But hey, there’s at least one upside: your stomach is tender and stretched, but not only has it not hurt at any point during this process, but it actually feels kind of good. Your [pc.cunt] is also growing more tender, and if your mind wanders to even the least erotic of thoughts, wetness beads down your thighs like "+("half-ausar"===pc.originalRace?"you were":"an ausar")+" in heat. Damn, just thinking about it makes you horny! It’s hard not to wonder how good it would feel to get railed while your tummy’s this full. You ought to find a couple of big, beautiful dragon-women to really lay into you... hands all over your baby bump, kissing over every inch of your stomach while their knotted cocks plug your quim full of their rich seed... Okay, [pc.name], calm down there!

original:
After so long waddling around with this gravid belly, you’re really starting to get used to its presence... a genuine pang of sadness hits you when you realize it’s almost time to lay this big girl. You might not have had the same intimate experiences as a live-birthing mother - no little kicks in the night, or feeling her playing around inside you. It’s been a surprisingly sedate pregnancy, and yet this big ol’ egg in your belly has been a source of a deep maternal comfort ever since it grew in. You quite enjoy this feeling of fullness, of having a young life growing quietly inside you; she’s so well behaved!

And you have to admit, you’ve started to think you look pretty damn sexy with a belly this big. You should go into modeling the next time you get knocked up, you could take the galaxy by storm. Then again, you’d have a lot more fun finding a harem of big-dicked gryvain babes to keep you full of eggs and hot cum at all hours. Yeah, that sounds like a better use of your time...

But for right now, you should probably focus on getting somewhere safe and comfortable before this big girl comes popping out of you. Just the thought of pushing an egg this big out through your ever-wet cunny gives you a shiver of excitement. How fun is that going to be!?

Pain in your gut bends you over and fluid spills
onto the deck
onto the ground
into your [pc.lowerUndergarment]
. Alarm grips you as you feel your cervix dilate. With as much calm as you can muster, you consider the best course of action.

As quickly as you can, you waddle into your room, switch the auto-medkit on in the bathroom, carefully place yourself on the bed"+({var0}.isCrotchExposed()?", rip off your [pc.gear]":"")+" and spread your [pc.thighs], biological imperative virtually ordering you what to do.

original: Groaning at the timing, you shed your [pc.gear] and position yourself the best you can in the inhospitable and non-hospital-able terrain. The wish that you’d stayed somewhere indoors and safe hums through your thoughts like a mosquito, but there’s no helping it now - you’ll have to deliver on your own.

As quickly as you can, you waddle into the nearest restroom, grab the medkit drone off the wall (frontier bathrooms are thankfully readily equipped for this sort of thing), lock yourself in a cubicle and spread your [pc.thighs], biological imperative virtually ordering you what to do.
The medkit drone monitors your pulse and places a large sheet beneath your thighs, instructing you to bear down rhythmically with soft, wordless beeps.

Spasms wrack your pregnant body for the next hour, and your mind almost shuts down from the pain, operating on biological autopilot. There’s no relief when the first baby finally emerges via one gigantic clench, wailing heartily, none at all - because you know, from the weight and wriggling in your womb, that that’s simply one of "+{var1}.numToText({var0})+".

original: You grit your teeth and bear down again.
The drone hovers down, snipping the umbilical cord and cradling the child to one side whilst you grit your teeth and bear down again.

At long last, in a sweaty daze of utter exhaustion, you’re looking down at your tiny children, curled up in your arms "+({var0}.isLactating()?"nursing hungrily on your [pc.boobs]":"and whining hungrily")+". They’re "+({var2}.isAusar({var2})?"full ":"half-")+"ausars, and as predicted, you’ve given birth to "+{var4}.numToText({var3})+" of them, all safe and sound. Their coloration definitely reminds you of Ilaria, who deserves an email after all this, you suppose.

Their coloration definitely reminds you of Ilaria, who deserves an email after all this, you suppose.")

original: You spend a little time with the newborns first, cleaning them and playing with their cute pointed toes and brushing their nascent fur, drawing little whinnies and whines out of them. Tiny "+({var1}.isAusar({var0})?"paw-":"")+"hands touch your face and chest, exploring the world despite their blindness. Eventually, though, reality intrudes. With a heavy heart, you call up the incubation drone, which arrives altogether too fast, and carefully load the newborn pups into its protected belly. You watch the shuttle disappear, comforting yourself with the knowledge that you’ll be able to see them again soon at the Nursery.
